description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Run separate jobs to lint documentation, code, style, and typing, and to test, each using a ubuntu-latest environment with Python 3.9 for linting and a matrix of Python 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9 for testing. Install tox and use it to run the corresponding linter or tests.
